name: Cumberland County Militia Regiment
notes: Appointed by NC Provincial Congress, September 9, 1775. Active through end of war.

name: Highland Loyalist Column
notes: Assembled Cross Creek, January–February 1776. Approximately 1,500 at muster, reduced to 700–800 by time of battle. Commanded by BG Donald MacDonald (ill); LTC Donald MacLeod led the charge, KIA February 27, 1776. Disbanded and largely captured after Moore's Creek Bridge.
